title: Coffee Table with Planter
summary: This DIY coffee table is made out of 3/4" plywood and coated with cement.
description: This DIY coffee table is made out of 3/4" plywood and coated with cement. There is a hole in the top that allows a plant to grow through.

materials.name: Box Of 1 1/4" Pocket-Hole Screws (See Tools List)
Bag of feather finish concrete mix

steps.title: Cut the plywood
steps.body: Cut the pieces of the table according to the cut list and diagram shown here.

steps.title: Cut a hole in the top
steps.body: Draw a 10" diameter circle on one end of the top board and use a jigsaw to cut it out.

steps.title: Assemble, measure, and cut
steps.body: Use pocket holes to attach the two long sides to the top. Take a measurement between the sides and cut pieces to fit on the ends. Use pocket holes to attach the pieces.

steps.title: Add feet
steps.body: Screw 6" wide pieces that extend past the bottom of the box by 3/4" with 1-1/4" finish screws.

steps.title: Cover in concrete
steps.body: Mix feather finish cement mix and coat the exterior of the plywood box.
